alerts.headline: Winter Weather Advisory issued March 2 at 12:54PM EST until March 4 at 7:00AM EST by NWS Boston/Norton MA
alerts.description:
* WHAT...Mixed precipitation expected. Total snow and sleet
accumulations up to one inch and ice accumulations up to one-tenth
of an inch.

* WHERE...Northern Connecticut, northwest Rhode Island, and western,
central and northeastern Massachusetts.

* WHEN...From noon Tuesday to 7 AM EST Wednesday.

* IMPACTS...Plan on slippery road conditions. The hazardous
conditions could impact the Tuesday evening and Wednesday morning
commutes.

nws_forecast.name: Tonight
nws_forecast.detailed: Clear, with a low around 18. Southwest wind around 7 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Snow after 1pm. Partly sunny. High near 39, with temperatures falling to around 33 in the afternoon. South wind 6 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New snow accumulation of less than one inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain and snow before 8pm, then rain and snow between 8pm and 4am. Cloudy, with a low around 32. Northeast wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 54. Southwest wind around 7 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Partly Cloudy then Slight Chance Light Snow
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of snow after 5am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 31. Southwest wind around 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Slight Chance Light Snow then Chance Light Rain
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of snow before 7am, then a chance of rain. Partly sunny, with a high near 43. North wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain likely. Cloudy, with a low around 33. East wind 6 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%.

nws_forecast.name: Friday
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain likely. Cloudy, with a high near 40. Northeast wind around 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%.

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain. Cloudy, with a low around 34. Northeast wind 6 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain before 1pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 48. South wind 5 to 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 41. Southwest wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 56. Southwest wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 41. Southwest wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws_forecast.name: Monday
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain. Partly sunny, with a high near 56. Southwest wind around 9 mph.
